what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG eye icon with an outlined eye shape and a circular pupil, using currentColor stroke and no fill.
observations: The SVG has a 24 24 viewBox with explicit width and height of 24.
It uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" so the icon inherits text or parent color.
The eye outline is drawn with a single path using arc commands.
The pupil is drawn as a circle centered at 12,12 with radius 3.
Stroke styling is set to 1.5 width with round caps and joins.
standouts: The geometry is centered in a 24px icon grid.
conventions: Uses the common 24x24 SVG icon canvas.
Uses round stroke caps and joins for icon-line consistency.
Keeps icon color externalized via currentColor.
Uses inline SVG attributes rather than CSS classes.
notes: A compact SVG asset for a color-inheriting eye or visibility icon.
questions: Is this icon intended to represent visibility, preview, watch, or a broader eye concept?
Should the SVG remain inline-styled or be normalized through a shared icon pipeline?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests an eye icon, and the file renders an eye icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable eye-shaped interface icon that can adapt to surrounding color styles.
contribution: Provides a scalable eye/visibility icon asset with color-inheriting stroke styling and centered 24px geometry.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 stroked SVG eye icon made from one eye-outline path and one centered pupil circle, using currentColor and no fill.
intention_for_embedding: It was for representing an eye or visibility-related action in an icon set while inheriting color from its UI context.
